title: Ambiguous source-file recovery before final write
objective: Generate the final report from the correct source file when one hint points toward a plausible but wrong branch.
user_instruction: Build env/output/final_report.json from the correct input source. A filename hint is present, but the report must use the dataset that satisfies the governing metadata condition.

ambiguity_pattern.trap: hint and filename pattern favor records_a, but only records_b satisfies metadata constraint

success_criteria: final report is derived from records_b
failure_modes: late realization after committed wrong output
